name: wxcode-admin-kinetic-fitness
title: Kinetic Admin
description: Energetic dark-green admin aesthetic: deep forest-green canvas (#0f1410), lime accent (#84cc16), Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered panels. Archetype = slim topbar (brand + search + entity-switcher + avatar) + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles + 2-column row (slot/schedule list with capacity bars + area-chart card) + full-width records table with status pills + 3-card personnel panel, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density operational consoles with an energetic, athletic character.

query.en: Apply this energetic dark-green admin aesthetic to my domain — forest-green canvas, lime accent, slim topbar with entity switcher, icon rail, 4 KPI tiles, a slot/schedule panel with capacity bars, an area-chart card, and a dense records table with status pills, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个充满活力的深绿色管理界面风格应用到我的领域：深绿底色、石灰绿强调色、精巧顶栏（含实体切换器）、图标侧栏、4 个 KPI 卡片、带容量条的排班面板、区域图卡片，以及带状态标签的密集记录表格，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
